mapper.select: /* getCommCodeList */ SELECT COMM_CODE , CODE_NAME , CODE_EXPL , USEE_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{commYsno}, USEE_YSNO, #{useeYsnoCode}) AS USEE_YSNO_NAME , REGI_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(REGI_ADMN) AS REGI_ADMN_NAME , REGI_DATE , UPDT_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(UPDT_ADMN) AS UPDT_ADMN_NAME , UPDT_DATE FROM TM_CODEXM ORDER BY COMM_CODE

/*getCommCodeDtl*/ SELECT COMM_CODE , CODE_NAME , CODE_EXPL , USEE_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{commYsno}, USEE_YSNO, #{useeYsnoCode}) AS USEE_YSNO_NAME , REGI_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(REGI_ADMN) AS REGI_ADMN_NAME , REGI_DATE , UPDT_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(UPDT_ADMN) AS UPDT_ADMN_NAME , UPDT_DATE FROM TM_CODEXM WHERE COMM_CODE = #{commCode}

/*getCodeList*/ SELECT COMM_CODE , COMD_CODE , COMD_NAME , CODE_EXPL , OPT1_CODE , OPT1_NAME , OPT2_CODE , OPT2_NAME , OPT3_CODE , OPT3_NAME , OPT4_CODE , OPT4_NAME , USEE_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{commYsno}, USEE_YSNO, #{useeYsnoCode}) AS USEE_YSNO_NAME , REGI_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(REGI_ADMN) AS REGI_ADMN_NAME , REGI_DATE , UPDT_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(UPDT_ADMN) AS UPDT_ADMN_NAME , UPDT_DATE , SORT_ORDER FROM TB_CODEXD WHERE COMM_CODE = #{commCode} ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDER, 9999), COMD_CODE

/*getCodeDtl*/ SELECT COMM_CODE , COMD_CODE , COMD_NAME , CODE_EXPL , OPT1_CODE , OPT1_NAME , OPT2_CODE , OPT2_NAME , OPT3_CODE , OPT3_NAME , OPT4_CODE , OPT4_NAME , USEE_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{commYsno}, USEE_YSNO, #{useeYsnoCode}) AS USEE_YSNO_NAME , REGI_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(REGI_ADMN) AS REGI_ADMN_NAME , REGI_DATE , UPDT_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(UPDT_ADMN) AS UPDT_ADMN_NAME , UPDT_DATE , SORT_ORDER FROM TB_CODEXD WHERE COMM_CODE = #{commCode} AND COMD_CODE = #{comdCode}
